archetype_reasoning: Virtually every resolved and open trade is entered at near-certainty prices (0.94–0.998), collecting tiny premiums on outcomes that are already near-certain. Directionality is 1.0, indicating no genuine two-sided forecasting. The pattern of buying NO on longshot candidates (MTG, Vivek, LeBron James, Zohran Mamdani for 2028 presidency) and YES/NO on already-settled outcomes confirms classic yield harvesting rather than informational edge.
domain_blindspots: Trump_US: 53.8% accuracy at near-certainty prices implies occasional catastrophic losses when harvesting goes wrong
Other: 50% accuracy despite near-certainty entries suggests mispricing blindspots or resolution anomalies
domain_summary: This trader has no demonstrable informational edge in any domain. All activity is mechanical yield harvesting at extreme prices. Domain accuracy near 50% at near-certainty entries is a warning sign, not a strength signal.
signal_weight_reasoning: Entries at 0.94-0.998 provide zero directional signal for STR-003 purposes. The trader is not expressing beliefs about outcomes but collecting near-zero variance premiums. The 50-54% accuracy at these extreme prices also reveals losses on supposedly near-certain events, further undermining signal value.
behavioural_flags: Consistently enters at near-certainty prices (0.94-0.998) — no contested price entries observed
Directionality of 1.0 indicates all trades go same direction — no genuine two-sided market making or contrarian calls
Duplicate positions in same market at nearly identical prices (e.g., Michelle Obama popular vote: 4 entries at 0.994-0.998)
Open positions span extremely speculative longshot candidates for 2028 at 0.977-0.992 NO
Thin sample: only 27 resolved trades across 10 markets
risk_patterns: Near-certainty harvesting exposes trader to rare but catastrophic tail events (e.g., lost on 0.997 Michelle Obama NO — an ostensibly 'safe' trade)
Concentration in US electoral politics with no diversification into genuine uncertainty markets
Small realized PnL of -$2.98 despite near-certainty strategy suggests net negative even on this low-risk approach
Duplicate stacking in same markets at same prices suggests possible bot or automated strategy with no edge

notable_calls.significance: Lost a 0.997 near-certainty bet — reveals that even 'obvious' harvesting positions can resolve adversely, likely a resolution/market anomaly

open_positions_summary: All 15 open positions are near-certainty NO bets on longshot 2028 presidential candidates (Vivek, MTG, LeBron James, Tucker Carlson, Dwayne Johnson etc.) and a few US electoral markets. The sole YES position is Tim Walz as D-VP nominee at 0.966. The thesis is purely mechanical premium collection — no directional market view is implied beyond 'these longshots won't win.'
watch_items: Monitor whether any 2028 candidate positions resolve adversely due to unexpected market dynamics or early resolution triggers
Watch for escalation in position sizing — current sizes (~$75-150 face value) are small but stacking could amplify tail risk
Check if trader diversifies into genuine uncertainty markets, which would signal a strategy shift worth tracking
Observe whether the negative realized PnL deepens — if harvesting continues to underperform, trader may exit or change approach
summary: This trader is a pure yield harvester with zero informational signal value. All entries occur at 0.94+ near-certainty prices, directionality is a perfect 1.0, and the 27-trade sample shows only 50-54% accuracy even at these extreme prices — meaning the strategy has produced net losses of ~$3. The open book is a mechanical sweep of longshot 2028 candidates at NO prices above 0.96. Do not use this trader's positions as signals for any market; they reflect premium collection mechanics, not forecasting conviction.
